message:
test: pin ftw.h conformance via differential harness

Adds tests/conformance_diff_ftw_nftw.rs covering 2 functions:
- ftw: walks a controlled 5-entry tempdir tree, compares sorted
  (relative-path, typeflag) set
- nftw: same with FTW_PHYS and FTW_DEPTH flags

Discovered DISC-FTW-001: fl::ftw returns 0 on nonexistent dirpath
while POSIX/glibc return -1. Documented in test (logged not failed);
bd-ftw2 opened for the fix.

5 tests pass, 0 substantive divergences (1 documented gap).

Beads: bd-ftw1 (harness), bd-ftw2 (ftw error propagation fix)
